title: Cancel External Commands with Context in Go
summary: Run an external command from Go with exec.CommandContext so timeouts and cancellations stop the process cleanly.
highlights: Maps process cancellation to context errors
verification_notes: Run from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4. The verified test suite uses the current test binary as a helper process to cover successful commands, stderr output, timeouts, parent cancellation, and invalid input handling.
